name: Parkour Skyblock
description: Complete levels and do parkour tricks in Parkour Skyblock. Jump over obstacles, climb ledges, reach the portal! Jump on the slugs to fly higher. Run through a variety of blocks and have fun! Dont let the obstacles take you down and make you fall to the depths.
instructions: To move around the map you will have to use the scroll keys the space bar to jump as much as you can use it to move from left to right and the arrow to move forward
